title: Independently verify Obsidian fetch-binding fix and GUI smoke

do_not_read: other directories in ~/dev unless explicitly referenced

scope: Independent verification of the MVP-077 fetch-binding fix, Obsidian artifact freshness, and real disposable-vault Obsidian smoke.
goals: Do not trust MVP-077's self-verification; independently inspect the regression test and implementation shape.
Run npm test --prefix clients, node clients/obsidian/scripts/build-artifact.js --check, and node --check clients/obsidian/main.js.

Run a disposable-vault Obsidian GUI mock smoke with strict timeouts. Verify no failed-load toast, at least one broker POST reaches /v1/autocomplete, ghost text is visible before Tab, and Tab acceptance changes note.md.
If mock succeeds and it is safe, run one bounded pi-backed Obsidian Markdown request with synthetic note content only.
Record exact commands, evidence paths, pass/fail status, and any remaining blocker.
non_goals: Do not publish or install globally.
Do not send repository content to pi.
safety: Use disposable vaults and synthetic notes.
Use strict timeouts for GUI and pi commands.
success_criteria: If verification passes, mark Obsidian GUI acceptance trusted and clear MVP-076-B001 as fixed.
If verification fails, include concrete file/line or environment blockers and spawn/revive a focused fix task.
